mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PROJECT ( PROJECT_ID, PROJECT_CODE, PROJECT_NAME, CLIENT_NAME, DESCRIPTION, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{clientName}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE PROJECT SET PROJECT_CODE = #{projectCode}, PROJECT_NAME = #{projectName}, CLIENT_NAME = #{clientName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select: SELECT PROJECT_ID, PROJECT_CODE, PROJECT_NAME, CLIENT_NAME, DESCRIPTION, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM PROJECT WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}

SELECT PROJECT_ID, PROJECT_CODE, PROJECT_NAME, CLIENT_NAME, DESCRIPTION, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM PROJECT
AND ( PROJECT_CODE ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR PROJECT_NAME ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CLIENT_NAME ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
